    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    A

    Accusation - Class in com.cluegame.model
    Represents a formal accusation made by a player to end the game.
    Accusation(SuspectCard, WeaponCard, RoomCard) - Constructor for class com.cluegame.model.Accusation
    Constructs an Accusation with the given suspect, weapon and room.
    accuseButton - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.SidebarView
     
    active - Variable in class com.cluegame.players.Player
     
    addCard(Card) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.AIPlayer
    Overrides addCard to also record the card in the detective notepad.
    addCard(Card) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.Player
    Adds a card to this player's hand.
    addDoor(Square) - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Room
    Adds a door square to this room.
    addDoor(String, int, int) - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Board
    Marks a corridor square as a door for the given room and registers it with the Room object.
    addOccupant(String) - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Room
     
    addSection(VBox, String, String[]) - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.NotebookView
    Adds a labelled section of checkboxes to the notebook.
    advanceToNextPlayer() - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
    Advances to the next active player.
    advanceToNextPlayer() - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Game
    Advances currentPlayerIndex to the next active player.
    AI_ONLY_MAX_ROUNDS - Static variable in class com.cluegame.gui.SidebarView
    Maximum number of full rounds (each active AI gets one turn per round) before the AI-only endgame gives up.
    aiCountBox - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.SetupView
     
    aiLastExitedRoom - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
     
    aiOnlyTurnCount - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.SidebarView
     
    AIPlayer - Class in com.cluegame.players
    Represents an autonomous AI player in Clue! Moves toward rooms, makes random suggestions and uses a DetectiveNotepad to track seen cards and deduce when to make an accusation.
    AIPlayer(String, String, int, int) - Constructor for class com.cluegame.players.AIPlayer
    Constructs an AI player with a name, token and starting position.
    aiTurnPause - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.SidebarView
     
    allHumansEliminated() - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Game
    Returns true if all human players have been eliminated (wrong accusation).
    announcedAiOnlyPhase - Variable in class com.cluegame.model.Game
     
    appendHumanTurnBanner() - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.SidebarView
     
    appendLog(String) - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.SidebarView
     

    B

    Board - Class in com.cluegame.model
    Represents the Clue! game board.

    Constructs a new Board and initialises all rooms.

    BOARD_ROWS - Static variable in class com.cluegame.gui.BoardView
     
    boardImageView - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.BoardView
     
    boardView - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.SidebarView
     
    BoardView - Class in com.cluegame.gui
    Displays the Clue! board image with player tokens drawn on a Canvas overlay.
    BoardView(Game) - Constructor for class com.cluegame.gui.BoardView
    Creates a BoardView that loads the board image and sets up the token overlay canvas.
    BTN_WIDTH - Static variable in class com.cluegame.gui.SidebarView
     

    C

    Card - Class in com.cluegame.cards
    Abstract base class representing a Clue! game card.
    Card(String, Card.CardType) - Constructor for class com.cluegame.cards.Card
    Constructs a card with the given name and type.
    Card.CardType - Enum Class in com.cluegame.cards
    The type of card.

    cardType - Variable in class com.cluegame.cards.Card

    checkAccusation(Accusation) - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
    Checks an accusation against the murder envelope.
    checkAccusation(Accusation) - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Game
    Checks whether an accusation matches the murder envelope.
    checkBoxes - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.NotebookView
     
    chooseCard(Player, List<Card>, String) - Method in interface com.cluegame.gui.GameController.SuggestionCardChooser
     
    chooseSuggestionCard(List<Card>, String) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.AIPlayer
    Automatically shows the first matching card to the suggesting player.
    chooseSuggestionCard(List<Card>, String) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.HumanPlayer
    When this player must disprove a suggestion, lets them choose which matching card to show.
    chooseSuggestionCard(List<Card>, String) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.Player
    Called when this player must disprove a suggestion and holds one or more matching cards.
    chooseSuggestionCardForGui(Player, List<Card>, String) - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.SidebarView
     
    clearHighlights() - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.BoardView
    Clears all highlighted squares and redraws.
    clearScreen() - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Game
    Prints blank lines to push previous content off the visible terminal.
    clickListener - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.BoardView
     
    ClueGameApp - Class in com.cluegame.gui
    JavaFX launcher for the Clue! GUI.

    Returns true if this room card is still useful evidence for the AI.

    Creates a consistently styled action button.

    D

    deal(int) - Method in class com.cluegame.cards.Deck
    Deals cards as evenly as possible to the given number of players.
    DEBUG_OVERLAY - Static variable in class com.cluegame.gui.BoardView
    Set to true to draw the debug grid overlay with cell types.
    deck - Variable in class com.cluegame.model.Game
     
    Deck - Class in com.cluegame.cards
    Represents the full deck of 21 Clue! cards.
    Deck() - Constructor for class com.cluegame.cards.Deck
    Constructs a full deck of 21 cards: 6 suspects, 6 weapons and 9 rooms.
    deduceMissing(String[]) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.DetectiveNotepad
    Given a complete list of names in a category (e.g.
    DetectiveNotepad - Class in com.cluegame.players
    Tracks which cards a player has seen or eliminated during the game.
    DetectiveNotepad() - Constructor for class com.cluegame.players.DetectiveNotepad
     
    determineFirstPlayer() - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Game
    Sets the first player to whoever holds the Scarlett token.
    dice - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
     
    dice - Variable in class com.cluegame.model.Game
     
    Dice - Class in com.cluegame.model
    Represents a pair of fair six-sided dice.
    Dice() - Constructor for class com.cluegame.model.Dice
    Constructs a new Dice object with a random seed.
    displayedPlayer - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.SidebarView
     
    displayHeight - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.BoardView
     
    displayWidth - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.BoardView
     
    disproved - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController.SuggestionResult
     
    disproverName - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController.SuggestionResult
     
    doors - Variable in class com.cluegame.model.Room
     
    drawDebugOverlay(GraphicsContext, double, double, double, double, double) - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.BoardView
    Draws the debug grid overlay showing cell types from Board.java.
    drawOverlay() - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.BoardView
    Draws the full canvas overlay: highlighted squares then player tokens.
    drawTokens() - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.BoardView
    Redraws tokens and highlights.

    E

    endMove() - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
    Ends the current player's movement early.
    endMoveButton - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.SidebarView
     
    endMovementPhase() - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.SidebarView
     
    endTurnButton - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.SidebarView
     
    enterCurrentDoor() - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
    Enters the room at the current player's position (after landing on a door).
    ENTERED_ROOM - Enum constant in enum class com.cluegame.gui.GameController.MoveResult
     
    enterRoom(Room) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.Player
    Places the player inside a room.
    enterSuggestionPhase() - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.SidebarView
     
    envelope - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
     
    exitRoom(int) - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
    Exits the current player from their room via the chosen option index.

    F

    fillBlocked(int, int, int, int) - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Board
    Fills a rectangular region with BLOCKED squares.
    fillRoom(String, int, int, int, int) - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Board
    Fills a rectangular region with ROOM squares and links them to the named Room object.
    findAnyValidDirection(Player) - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
    Falls back to any valid single-step move if no route to a door is found.
    findBestDirection(Board, List<Player>) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.AIPlayer
    Picks the best direction to move by trying to get closer to the nearest room door.
    findBestDirection(Player) - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
    Finds the next step for an AI player to move, following a shortest reachable path toward a room door rather than using a greedy Manhattan-distance heuristic.
    findFreeDoor(Room, List<Player>) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.AIPlayer
    Finds a random unblocked door in the given room.
    findNearestDoor(Board) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.AIPlayer
    Finds the nearest room door on the board, preferring rooms the AI has not yet visited (to gather information about more rooms).
    findPathStepToAnyDoor(Player, List<Square>) - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
    Runs a breadth-first search from the AI's current position and returns the first step on a shortest reachable path to any target door.
    findPathStepToRoom(Player, String) - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
     
    finishTurn() - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.SidebarView
     

    G

    game - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.BoardView
     
    game - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
     
    Game - Class in com.cluegame.model
    Top-level game controller.
    Game(List<Player>) - Constructor for class com.cluegame.model.Game
    Constructs a new Game with the given list of players.
    Game(List<Player>, Scanner) - Constructor for class com.cluegame.model.Game
    Constructs a new Game with the given list of players and a shared Scanner.
    GameController - Class in com.cluegame.gui
    Controller for the JavaFX GUI turn flow.
    GameController(Game) - Constructor for class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
    Creates a controller for the given game state.
    GameController.MoveResult - Enum Class in com.cluegame.gui
    Result of a movement attempt.
    GameController.SuggestionCardChooser - Interface in com.cluegame.gui
     
    GameController.SuggestionResult - Class in com.cluegame.gui
    Result of a suggestion resolution.

    getRoom() - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Suggestion
    Returns the room the murder is suggested to have occurred in.
    getRoom(String) - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Board
    Returns a room by name.
    getRoomAt(int, int) - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Board
    Returns the Room associated with the square at the given position, or null if the square has no room (e.g.
    getRoomExitOptions() - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
    Returns the list of exit options for a player currently in a room.
    getRooms() - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Board
    Returns all rooms on the board.

    Returns the pixel position for a player's token inside their room.

    Returns the start position for a given token name.

    Asks the player whether to enter the room or keep moving past the door.

    HumanPlayer - Class in com.cluegame.players
    Represents a human-controlled player in Clue! Movement, suggestions and accusations are made via console input.
    HumanPlayer(String, String, int, int) - Constructor for class com.cluegame.players.HumanPlayer
    Constructs a human player with a name, token and starting position.
    HumanPlayer(String, String, int, int, Scanner) - Constructor for class com.cluegame.players.HumanPlayer
    Constructs a human player with a custom Scanner (useful for testing).

    I

    initialiseGrid() - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Board
    Initialises the grid with the classic Cluedo board layout.
    initialiseRooms() - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Board
    Creates all 9 rooms on the board.
    INVALID - Enum constant in enum class com.cluegame.gui.GameController.MoveResult
     
    isActive() - Method in class com.cluegame.players.Player
     
    isCurrentPlayerAI() - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
    Returns true if the current player is an AI player.
    isCurrentPlayerHuman() - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
    Returns true if the current player is a human player.
    isDisproved() - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController.SuggestionResult
     
    isDoor(int, int) - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Board
    Returns true if the square at the given position is a door.
    isDoorBlocked(Square, Player) - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
     
    isDoorBlocked(Square, List<Player>) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.HumanPlayer
    Checks if a door square is occupied by another player in the corridor.
    isEnvelopeCandidate(String) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.AIPlayer
     
    isGameOver() - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
     
    isGameOver() - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Game
     
    isMovementActive() - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
     
    isOccupied() - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Square
     
    isSealed() - Method in class com.cluegame.cards.MurderEnvelope
    Returns true if the envelope has been sealed.
    isSeen(Card) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.DetectiveNotepad
    Returns true if this card has already been seen.
    isValidMove(int, int, int, int) - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Board
    Checks whether moving from one square to another is valid.
    isValidMove(int, int, int, int, List<Player>) - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Board
    Checks whether moving from one square to another is valid, including player collision.

    L

    LANDED_ON_DOOR - Enum constant in enum class com.cluegame.gui.GameController.MoveResult
     
    lastExitedRoom - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
    Current AI's last exited room for the active turn.
    lastSuggestedSuspect - Variable in class com.cluegame.players.AIPlayer
     
    lastSuggestedWeapon - Variable in class com.cluegame.players.AIPlayer
     
    layoutChildren() - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.BoardView
    Called by JavaFX during layout.
    learnFromUndisprovedSuggestion(Suggestion) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.AIPlayer
     
    leaveRoom() - Method in class com.cluegame.players.Player
    Removes the player from their current room so they can move through corridors again.
    loadFromFile(String) - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Board
    Loads the board layout from an external text config file.
    loadState(boolean[]) - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.NotebookView

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class com.cluegame.gui.ClueGameApp
     
    main(String[]) - Static method in class com.cluegame.Main
    Launches the game.
    Main - Class in com.cluegame
    Main entry point for the Clue! console prototype.
    Main() - Constructor for class com.cluegame.Main
     
    makeAccusation() - Method in class com.cluegame.players.AIPlayer
    Makes an accusation only when the AI has enough confirmed information.
    makeAccusation() - Method in class com.cluegame.players.HumanPlayer
    Asks the human player if they want to make an accusation.
    makeAccusation() - Method in class com.cluegame.players.Player
    Makes an accusation.
    makeSuggestion() - Method in class com.cluegame.players.AIPlayer
    Makes a suggestion using the current room.
    makeSuggestion() - Method in class com.cluegame.players.HumanPlayer
    Lets the human player make a suggestion via console input.
    makeSuggestion() - Method in class com.cluegame.players.Player
    Makes a suggestion.
    markSeen(Card) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.DetectiveNotepad
    Marks a card as seen/eliminated from suspicion.
    markSeen(String) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.DetectiveNotepad
    Marks a card name as seen/eliminated from suspicion.
    markVisitedRoom(String) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.AIPlayer
    Records that the AI has physically visited a room.
    moveAITowardRoom(AIPlayer, List<String>) - Method in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
    Moves an AI player toward a room they haven't just exited, using dice roll and step-by-step pathfinding.
    MOVED - Enum constant in enum class com.cluegame.gui.GameController.MoveResult
     
    movementActive - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.GameController
     
    moveNonPlayerSuspect(String, Room) - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Game
    Moves a non-player suspect piece into a room by name.
    MoveResult() - Constructor for enum class com.cluegame.gui.GameController.MoveResult
     
    movesLabel - Variable in class com.cluegame.gui.SidebarView

    Moves the accused suspect's playing piece to the suggestion room.

    Moves the player to a new position on the board.

    Moves a weapon token to a room (used during suggestion resolution).

    Executes a single turn for the current player: movement, then suggestion (if in a room), then optional accusation.

    Prints a text representation of the board to standard output.
    printBoard(List<Player>) - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Board
    Prints the board with player positions overlaid.
    printGameOver() - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Game
    Prints the game-over message including the winner (if any) and the contents of the murder envelope.
    printStatus() - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Game
    Prints the current board state with player positions and a turn header.

    Reads an integer from the console within the given range (inclusive).

    Reads an integer from the console within the given range (inclusive).

    Resolves a suggestion by going clockwise from the current player.
    resolveSuggestion(Player, Suggestion) - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Game
    Resolves a suggestion by going clockwise from the suggesting player.

    Rolls both dice and returns the total.

    Rolls the dice and starts the movement phase for the current player.

    Rolls a single die and returns the result.

    Seals the envelope with the three solution cards.

    seeDisprovalCard(Card, String) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.AIPlayer
    Records a shown card in the detective notepad for future deduction.
    seeDisprovalCard(Card, String) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.HumanPlayer
    Called when another player shows this player a card to disprove their suggestion.
    seeDisprovalCard(Card, String) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.Player
    Called when another player shows this player a card to disprove a suggestion.
    seenCards - Variable in class com.cluegame.players.DetectiveNotepad

    Sets a listener that is called when the user clicks a board cell.

    Switches the notebook view to the given player's personal notes.

    Sets the list of squares to highlight as valid move destinations.

    Updates the phase indicator label.

    Records a suggestion that no one could disprove.

    startGame() - Method in class com.cluegame.model.Game
    Starts the game by shuffling the deck, sealing the murder envelope, dealing remaining cards to players, and placing tokens on start squares.

    Starts the game with the configured Game instance.

    Represents a suggestion made by a player during their turn.

    SuspectCard - Class in com.cluegame.cards
    Represents a suspect card in Clue! There are 6 suspect cards in the game.

    Constructs a suspect card with the given name.

    T

    takeTurn(Board, Dice, List<Player>) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.AIPlayer
    Takes a turn by rolling the dice and moving toward the nearest room.
    takeTurn(Board, Dice, List<Player>) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.HumanPlayer
    Takes a turn by rolling the dice and moving step-by-step through corridors.
    takeTurn(Board, Dice, List<Player>) - Method in class com.cluegame.players.Player
    Takes a turn — handles movement for this player.
    token - Variable in class com.cluegame.players.Player
